reviews.comment:
Desde que visite el taller mecanico de este lugar no hago mas que tener problemas con mi auto, hicieron un desastre con el embrague, quedo mal la primera vez  y quedo peor la segunda que era para solucionar. evidentemente por tercera vez no vuelvo. Una fortuna de guita en concepto de garatia que no lo vale. No se como hacen para ser tan despelotados con la atención del recepcionista del taller, la predisposicion de solucionar por parte del mecanico y la impronta dudosa del concecionario.

No visiten este lugar por que es un dolor de cabeza. Una pena por el prestigio que maneja el automovil club que por cierto ya no es lo que alguna vez fue. Toda el buen servicio que alguna vez gozaron mis padres cuando eran socios ya no existe más.

(Translated by Google)
Ever since I visited this mechanic's shop, I've had nothing but problems with my car. They botched the clutch; it was bad the first time and even worse the second time, which was supposed to be fixed. Obviously, I won't be going back a third time. A fortune was spent on a warranty that wasn't worth it. I don't know how they manage to be so disorganized, with the receptionist's lack of service, the mechanic's unwillingness to help, and the dealership's overall questionable reputation.

Don't go to this place; it's a nightmare. It's a shame for the reputation of the Automobile Club, which, by the way, is no longer what it once was. All the excellent service my parents enjoyed when they were members is gone.
